evidence: The paper gathers variable importance data and identifies understudied kinases CSNK2A1/3, CAMKK2, and PIP4K2C as novel targets based on their high importance rankings: "CSNK2A1/3 was identified as highly ranking in the P0422-T1 tumor line" and "CAMKK2...is a top feature found only in the P0119-T1 CAF." The validation study (Fig. 5) confirms predictive accuracy on held-out compounds but does not corroborate the relative importance rankings themselves, only the binary viability predictions. No alternative importance methods (permutation, SHAP, PDP/ALE, conditional) are applied to verify ranking stability.
